typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	hasErrored as boolean (),
	WcfErrorMsg as string ()
}

source(output(
		Id as integer,
		Source as string,
		Date as date,
		Tenor as double,
		Value as double,
		filename as string,
		createDate as timestamp
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT Id, Source, Date, Tenor, Value, filename, createDate FROM [Staging].[UserDefinedCurveImport] I  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT ImportId FROM [Staging].[UserDefinedCurveTransform]  WHERE ImportId = I.Id AND curveId IS NOT NULL)',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> Getloadeddata	source(output(
		ImportId as integer,
		Status as string,
		Error as string,
		Date as date,
		Tenor as double,
		Value as double,
		SubCategoryId as integer,
		ClientAgentId as integer,
		ClientId as integer,
		ClientLocationId as integer,
		UserId as integer,
		CurveId as integer,
		Description as string,
		Namespace as string,
		MDCurveId as long,
		MDVersionId as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from Staging.UserDefinedCurveTransform',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> AlreadytransformedLKPTABLE	source(output(
		Source as string,
		ClientAgentId as integer,
		ClientId as integer,
		ClientLocationId as integer,
		UserId as integer,
		SubCategoryId as integer,
		Description as string,
		PointScaling as double,
		Namespace as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from Mapping.UserDefinedSource',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupdataLKPTABLE
Getloadeddata,LookupdataLKPTABLE lookup(Getloadeddata@Source == LookupdataLKPTABLE@Source,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookupdata
Lookupdata select(mapColumn(
		Id = Id,
		Source = Getloadeddata@Source,
		Date = Date,
		Tenor = Tenor,
		Value = Value,
		filename = filename,
		createDate = createDate,
		ClientAgentId = ClientAgentId,
		ClientId = ClientId,
		ClientLocationId = ClientLocationId,
		UserId = UserId,
		SubCategoryId = SubCategoryId,
		Description = Description,
		PointScaling = PointScaling,
		Namespace = Namespace
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupdataSelect
LookupdataSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupdataIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupdataIsMatch@Match derive(Status = 'Transformed') ~> Status
LookupdataIsMatch@NotMatch derive(Error = 'Failed to match souce '' + Source + ''',
		Status = 'Transform failed',
		{} = toDouble({})) ~> Adderrormessage
Status derive(Value = Value / iifNull(PointScaling,toDouble(1.0))) ~> Scalepoint
Adderrormessage,Scalepoint union(byName: true) ~> UnionAll
UnionAll,AlreadytransformedLKPTABLE lookup(Id == ImportId,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Alreadytransformed
Alreadytransformed select(mapColumn(
		Id = Id,
		Source = Source,
		Date = UnionAll@Date,
		Tenor = UnionAll@Tenor,
		Value = UnionAll@Value,
		filename = filename,
		createDate = createDate,
		ClientAgentId = UnionAll@ClientAgentId,
		ClientId = UnionAll@ClientId,
		ClientLocationId = UnionAll@ClientLocationId,
		UserId = UnionAll@UserId,
		SubCategoryId = UnionAll@SubCategoryId,
		Status = UnionAll@Status,
		Error = UnionAll@Error,
		Description = UnionAll@Description,
		Namespace = UnionAll@Namespace,
		{} = {},
		PointScaling = PointScaling,
		ImportId = ImportId,
		CurveId = CurveId,
		MDCurveId = MDCurveId,
		MDVersionId = MDVersionId
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> AlreadytransformedSelect
AlreadytransformedSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> AlreadytransformedIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
AlreadytransformedIsMatch@NotMatch sink(input(
		Status as string,
		Description as string,
		SubCategoryId as integer,
		Error as string,
		ImportId as integer,
		Date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ClientLocationId as integer,
		Namespace as string,
		Tenor as double,
		UserId as integer,
		Value as double,
		ClientId as integer,
		ClientAgentId as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Status,
		Description,
		SubCategoryId,
		Error,
		ImportId = Id,
		Date,
		ClientLocationId,
		Namespace,
		Tenor,
		UserId,
		Value,
		ClientId,
		ClientAgentId)) ~> InsertUserDefinedCurveTransform
